exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I want to drink water.
I wanted to drink water.
I will drink water.
I am drinking water.

exercises.audioScript: She wanted to become a doctor.
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: She wants to become a doctor.
She is becoming a doctor.
She wanted to become a doctor.
She will become a doctor.
exercises.answer: She wanted to become a doctor.

exercises.audioScript: Did he want to go there?
exercises.hindiScript: क्या वह वहाँ जाना चाहता था?
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: Did he wanted to go there?
Does he want to go there?
Did he want to go there?
Was he wanting to go there?
exercises.answer: Did he want to go there?

exercises.audioScript: I did not want to waste any time.
exercises.hindiScript: मैं कोई भी समय बर्बाद नहीं करना चाहता था।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I do not want to waste time.
I did not want to waste any time.
I didn't wanted to waste time.
I was not wanting to waste time.
exercises.answer: I did not want to waste any time.

exercises.audioScript: We wanted to finish the project before the deadline.
exercises.hindiScript: हम project को deadline से पहले खत्म करना चाहते थे।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: We want to finish the project.
We wanted to finish the project before the deadline.
We are finishing the project.
We will finish before the deadline.
exercises.answer: We wanted to finish the project before the deadline.

exercises.audioScript: I just wanted to say thank you.
exercises.hindiScript: मैं बस शुक्रिया कहना चाहता था।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I just want to say thank you.
I just said thank you.
I just wanted to say thank you.
I wanted just saying thank you.
exercises.answer: I just wanted to say thank you.

exercises.audioScript: She said she wanted to meet you.
exercises.hindiScript: उसने कहा कि वह तुमसे मिलना चाहती थी।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: She says she wants to meet you.
She said she wanted to meet you.
She told she want to meet you.
She was wanting to meet you.
exercises.answer: She said she wanted to meet you.

exercises.audioScript: He always wanted to work in this field.
exercises.hindiScript: वह हमेशा से इस field में काम करना चाहता था।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: He always wants to work in this field.
He always worked in this field.
He always wanted to work in this field.
He was always wanting to work in this field.
exercises.answer: He always wanted to work in this field.

exercises.hindiScript: वे एक बेहतर भविष्य चाहते थे।

options: They want a better future.

They will want a better future.
They are wanting a better future.

exercises.audioScript: Did you want to come with us?
exercises.hindiScript: क्या तुम हमारे साथ आना चाहते थे?
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: Do you want to come with us?
Will you come with us?
Are you wanting to come with us?
Did you want to come with us?
exercises.answer: Did you want to come with us?

exercises.audioScript: I wanted to call you but I was busy.
exercises.hindiScript: मैं तुम्हें call करना चाहता था पर busy था।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I wanted to call you but I am busy.
I want to call you but I was busy.
I wanted to call you but I was busy.
I had wanted to call you.
exercises.answer: I wanted to call you but I was busy.

exercises.audioScript: The manager wanted to end the meeting early.
exercises.hindiScript: Manager meeting जल्दी खत्म करना चाहते थे।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: The manager wants to end the meeting early.
The manager ended the meeting early.
The manager wanted to end the meeting early.
The manager is wanting to end the meeting early.
exercises.answer: The manager wanted to end the meeting early.

dictationPassage.text: Riya always wanted to become a doctor. She did not want to waste any time. Her parents wanted her to study hard. Did she want this for herself? Yes — she just wanted to serve people. She wanted a life with purpose and no regrets.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: Riya हमेशा doctor बनना चाहती थी। वह कोई भी समय बर्बाद नहीं करना चाहती थी। उसके माता-पिता चाहते थे कि वह मन लगाकर पढ़े। क्या उसने यह खुद के लिए चाहा? हाँ — वह बस लोगों की सेवा करना चाहती थी। वह एक ऐसी ज़िंदगी चाहती थी जिसमें purpose हो और कोई पछतावा न हो।
